en: Your first story was better. Where's that bellows cramp?
He probably owes you money, huh? Well, I'll ask him.
ko: 아마 너한테 돈을 빚지고 있을 거야, 응? 내가 물어볼게.

en: He's dead. He can't talk. Look who knows so much, huh?
Well, it just so happens that your friend here is only mostly dead.
ko: 그런데 여기 있는 네 친구는 거의 죽은 상태야.

en: There's a big difference between mostly dead and all dead.
ko: 거의 죽은 것과 완전히 죽은 것은 큰 차이가 있어.

en: Now, mostly dead, he's slightly alive.
ko: 지금, 거의 죽은 상태에서 그는 약간 살아 있어.

en: Now, all dead, well, with all dead, there's usually only one thing that you can do.
What's that? Go through his clothes and look for loose change.
What you got here, that's worth living for.
ko: 여기서 살 가치가 있는 게 뭐야?

en: True love, you heard him? You could not ask for a more noble cause than that.
ko: 진정한 사랑, 들었어? 더 바랄 게 없어.
